input_question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?
decomposed_queries: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?
top_candidate_question: Which trials satisfy Name of ICI = Atezolizumab AND Cancer type = Colorectal AND Control arm = Multikinase inhibitor?
top_candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';
